title: HMI to transfer shares in Gostal Nickel to TGEM Ptd Ltd Singapore
body: PT Trinitan Green Energy Minerals (TGEM) has decided to sell the shares of its subsidiary, PT Hydortech Metal Indonesia (HMI), in PT Gostal Nickel Indonesia (GNI) to TGEM Pt Ltd Singapore for IDR 15.70 billion last week (31/10).

title: Inflation recorded at 1.17% in October 2024
body: The Central Statistics Agency (BPS) recorded inflation in October 2024 at 1.71%, lower than October 2024 at 2.56%.

title: BRI pays bonds worth IDR 2.1 trillion in November
body: This November, PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI), a state-owned bank, is the first issuer to settle its bond debt. Obligasi Berkelanjutan III Bank BRI Tahap I Tahun 2019 Seri C, worth an incredible IDR 2.17 trillion, will be paid to investors by BRI on November 7. Additionally, this marks the biggest bond payment during this time frame.

title: BRI channelled loan and financing of IDR 1.35 quadrillion as of September 2024
body: Loan and financing distribution of PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI) reportedly grew 8.2% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 1.35 quadrillion as of September (9M) 2024 from IDR 1.25 quadrillion in 9M 2023.

title: Nicke Widyawati to be replaced by Simon Aloysius Mantiri as Pertamina’s Director
body: The State Ministry of State-Owned Enterprise (SOE) has appointed Simon Aloysius Mantiri as President Director of PT Pertamina (Persero), replacing Nicke Widyawati.

title: HMI to transfer shares in Gostal Nickel to TGEM Ptd Ltd Singapore
body: PT Trinitan Green Energy Minerals (TGEM) has decided to sell the shares of its subsidiary, PT Hydortech Metal Indonesia (HMI), in PT Gostal Nickel Indonesia (GNI) to TGEM Pt Ltd Singapore for IDR 15.70 billion last week (31/10).

title: Inflation recorded at 1.17% in October 2024
body: The Central Statistics Agency (BPS) recorded inflation in October 2024 at 1.71%, lower than October 2024 at 2.56%.

title: BRI pays bonds worth IDR 2.1 trillion in November
body: This November, PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI), a state-owned bank, is the first issuer to settle its bond debt. Obligasi Berkelanjutan III Bank BRI Tahap I Tahun 2019 Seri C, worth an incredible IDR 2.17 trillion, will be paid to investors by BRI on November 7. Additionally, this marks the biggest bond payment during this time frame.

title: BRI channelled loan and financing of IDR 1.35 quadrillion as of September 2024
body: Loan and financing distribution of PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI) reportedly grew 8.2% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 1.35 quadrillion as of September (9M) 2024 from IDR 1.25 quadrillion in 9M 2023.

title: Nicke Widyawati to be replaced by Simon Aloysius Mantiri as Pertamina’s Director
body: The State Ministry of State-Owned Enterprise (SOE) has appointed Simon Aloysius Mantiri as President Director of PT Pertamina (Persero), replacing Nicke Widyawati.

title: Pyridam Farma’s loss worsened to IDR 214.2 billion in 9M 2024
body: PT Pyridam Farma Tbk (PYFA), a pharmaceutical company, booked net loss of IDR 214.2 billion in the first nine months (9M) 2024.

title: Foreign transactions almost reach 3 billion shares, net foreign closed at -133.37 million shares
body: On Friday, November 1, foreign stock purchasing and selling totaled nearly 3 billion shares, with 2.85 billion shares purchased and 2.98 billion shares sold. As a result, net foreign volume finished at -133.37 million shares.

title: Trimegah Sekuritas purchases over 424 million shares of ENRG (Energi Mega Persada)
body: PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk's acquisition of 424.80 million shares of PT Energi Mega Persada Tbk (ENRG) prompted market hints on Wednesday, October 30. By this deal, the investor was able to raise its ownership stake in the company that was exploring for and trading oil and gas from 14.41% to 16.12%.

title: Foreign buy almost hit 4 billion shares, net foreign volume surplus at 205.16 million shares
body: On Thursday, October 31, foreign buying volume climbed to 3.90 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign sales volume was only 3.69 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume surplus of 205.16 million. The coal mining company PT Bumi Resources Tbk (BUMI) had the greatest share acquisition, with 200.64 million shares bought and a net volume of 166.77 million shares.

title: Recurring income reaches 90%, INPP profit increases 121%
body: PT Indonesian Paradise Property Tbk (INPP) continues to record performance improvements until the end of September 2024, even recording a 121% year-on-year (yoy) increase in profit for the current year.

title: Automotive industry sluggish, new ADMF financing declines by 9% as of September 2024
body: PT Adira Dinamika Multi Finance Tbk (ADMF) recorded a decline in new financing of up to 9% year-on-year (yoy) at the end of September (9M) 2024, following the trend of weakening car sales.

title: TINS ​​recorded IDR 908.81 billion in third quarter net profit
body: PT Timah (Persero) Tbk (TINS) made a profit of IDR 908.81 billion in the third quarter of 2024, growing 169% from the previously set target.

title: SMAR distributes interim dividend of IDR 301.58 billion
body: PT Sinar Mas Agro Resources and Technology Tbk (SMAR) will distribute an interim dividend of IDR 301.58 billion from the 2024 financial year. Dividend payments will be made on (20/11).

title: DMAS secures IDR 1.5 trillion in credit for Deltamas area development
body: PT Puradelta Lestari Tbk (DMAS) received a loan facility of IDR 1.5 trillion from PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI) for the development of the Deltamas area. This issuer manages the Deltamas area of ​​3,200 hectares (ha).

title: Prodia's net profit corrected 17.5% at the end of September 2024
body: PT Prodia Widyahusada Tbk (PRDA), the company that oversees the Prodia laboratory network, is still experiencing a downward trend in net profit until September 2024.

title: VOKS will pay off two bonds worth IDR 350 billion
body: PT Voksel Electric Tbk (VOKS) will pay off two 2023 Shelf Registration Bonds worth a total of IDR 350 billion.

title: KAI to issue bonds and sukuk with a principal amount of IDR 2 trillion
body: PT Kereta Api Indonesia (Persero) or KAI will issue Shelf Registration Bonds II Phase I/2024 with a principal amount of IDR 1.5 trillion and Shelf Registration Sukuk Ijarah II Phase I/2024 with a principal amount of IDR 500 billion.

title: Trisula Textile Industries' net profit grows 5% in 9M 2024
body: PT Trisula Textile Industries Tbk (BELL), an issuer providing fabric and apparel, posted a net profit of IDR 12.82 billion in the first nine months (9M) of 2024.

title: Ending Q3 2024, SMGR’s profit down 58%
body: PT Semen Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (SMGR) reported a downturn in Q3 2024 compared to the same period last year.

title: INDY saw 63.33% downturn in profit until Q3 2024
body: The profit of PT Indika Energy Tbk (INDY) plummeted 63.33% year-on-year (yoy) at the end of Q3 2024 compared to Q3 2023.

title: Securing IDR 500 billion loan, GOLF to build 6-star hotel in Bali
body: PT New Kuta Golf and Ocean View (NKG), a subsidiary of PT Intra Golflink Resorts Tbk (GOLF), has obtained a facility worth IDR 500 billion from PT Bank Nationanobu Tbk (NOBU) to fund 6-star hotel establishment in Bali.

title: Struggling throughout the year, Astra finally stabilised profit in September 2024
body: PT Astra International Tbk (ASII) or Astra Group finally recorded relatively stable profit trend in September (9M) 2024 compared to 9M 2023.

title: Shoes sales decline, BIMA to divest assets to cover debts
body: PT Primarindo Asia Infrastructure Tbk (BIMA), a shoe manufacturer operating since 1989, will divest some of its landbank to pay its obligations to creditors and suppliers.

title: Two years debuting, RAFI’s net profit down 76.8% in 9M 2024
body: PT Sari Kreasi Boga Tbk (RAFI), a processed food manufacturer and the holder of Kebab Baba Rafi franchise license, only managed to collect net profit of IDR 24.62 billion within the first nine months (9M) of 2024.

title: WIFI’s net profit increased 3.4 times in 9M 2024
body: PT Solusi Sinergi Digital Tbk (WIFI), a digital company debuted in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) in 2020, announced net profit of IDR 152.07 billion recorded within the first nine months (9M) of 2024.

title: Turning the tide, JAST finally collected IDR 218.7 million of profit in September 2024
body: PT Jasnita Telekomindo Tbk (JAST) managed to bring in net profit of IDR 218.7 million in the first nine months (9M) of 2024, turning the tide from the loss it faced in 9M 2023 of IDR 3.2 billion.

title: Take a look at top 10 stocks with exorbitant prices
body: Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) lists 10 top stocks with the highest prices in the stock market, according to the last closing price on Thursday (31/10).

title: Habco Trans Maritima obtains loan facility of IDR 540 billion from BCA
body: PT Habco Trans Maritima Tbk (HATM) has signed a credit agreement with PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA) or BCA with the limit set to IDR 540 billion.

title: MD Entertainment acquires 19% Net TV shares
body: On Tuesday, October 29, PT Net Visi Media Tbk (NETV), a holding company for mass media, attracted a new investor after welcoming Newton Capital the week before. A production company called PT MD Entertainment Tbk purchased over 7.88 billion NETV shares, or about 19.07% of the company. This fantastic transaction was facilitated by PT Samuel Sekuritas Indonesia.

title: CTRA secured IDR 1.27 trillion of profit until Q3 2024
body: PT Citra Development Tbk (CTRA), a housing developer, posted net profit of IDR 1.27 trillion until the third quarter (Q3) of 2024, up 8.12% year-on-year (yoy) from IDR 1.18 trillion in September (9M) 2023.

title: Foreign share transactions generate net foreign volume at -523.74 million shares
body: On Wednesday, October 30, foreign investors were seen purchasing and selling stocks, with a total of 2.60 billion shares purchased and 3.12 billion shares sold. As a result, net foreign volume closed at -523.74 million shares. The mineral mining business PT Bumi Resources Minerals Tbk (BRMS) had the most shares bought, with 263.45 million shares purchased for a net volume of 187.85 million shares.

title: PANI’s profit skyrocketed 91% as of September 2024
body: PT Pantai Indah Kapuk Dua Tbk (PANI), the developer of Pantai Indah Kapuk (PIK), booked net profit of 487 billion within the first nine months (9M) of 2024.

title: AVIA posted IDR 1.16 trillion of profit in Q3 2024
body: PT Avia Avian Tbk (AVIA), a paint manufacturer, booked net profit of IDR 1.16 trillion in Q3 2024, up from IDR 1.14 trillion seen in the same period in 2023.

title: CLEO profit soars 58.18% in third quarter
body: PT Sariguna Primatirta Tbk (CLEO), a bottled drinking water producer, posted profit growth of 58.18% in the third quarter of 2024 from the same period in 2023.

title: These are Top 10 Market Cap list in October
body: PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA) is at the top of the Top Market Capitalization (market cap) list in October 2024.
